# Lulusan

Rekapitulasi lulusan Universitas Sultan Ageng Tirtayasa jenjang Diploma, Sarjana, dan Pascasarjana sampai dengan Agustus 2021 (*sumber: Lampiran SK Lulusan per Agustus 2021*).

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(janitor)
library(kableExtra)
library(readxl)
lulusan <- read_excel("static/lulusan.xlsx")
lulusan[is.na(lulusan)] <- 0
names(lulusan) <- c("Program Studi", "Jenjang", "s.d.2016", "2017", "2018", "2019", "2020", "2021")
lulusan <- adorn_totals(lulusan, where = c("row", "col"), name = "Jumlah")
kable(lulusan, row.names = F) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = F,
                latex_options = "scale_down") %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "Tahun Kelulusan" = 6, " " = 1)) %>%
  pack_rows("Pascasarjana", 1, 10, label_row_css = "background-color: #666; color: #fff;") %>%
  pack_rows("Hukum", 11, 11, label_row_css = "background-color: #666; color: #fff;") %>%
  pack_rows("Keguruan dan Ilmu Pendidikan", 12, 33, label_row_css = "background-color: #666; color: #fff;") %>%
  pack_rows("Teknik", 34, 41, label_row_css = "background-color: #666; color: #fff;") %>%
  pack_rows("Pertanian", 42, 44, label_row_css = "background-color: #666; color: #fff;") %>%
  pack_rows("Ekonomi dan Bisnis", 45, 52, label_row_css = "background-color: #666; color: #fff;") %>%
  pack_rows("Ilmu Sosial dan Ilmu Politik", 53, 55, label_row_css = "background-color: #666; color: #fff;") %>%
  pack_rows("Kedokteran", 56, 59, label_row_css = "background-color: #666; color: #fff;")

```
